text:
There was once a farmer who dreamed lofty dreams.

One spring morning he noticed some wild roses. He said to himself:

If only I could get those roses...

And so he did.

Soon all sorts of roses.

Beautiful ones.

Oranges ones.

So lush.

So sweet.


They bloomed all summer.

Maybe my thoughts think best.



Just go see Mother.

I know.


So he kissed Mother.




Oh my stars..

So sweet.

Just how I feel.
